violations.text: Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the side storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC stated food would be raised by at least 6 inches. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving under the counters in the kitchen have an small accumulation of old rodent droppings. Areas to be cleaned and monitored. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
A hole in the wall next to the kitchen was observed. Hole to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
